title: Cave Story - Last Battle on Advanced Mario Sequencer
description:
STOP.

If you have not yet tried Cave Story, DO IT NOW. It's a 100% free game for the PC. It resembles a cross between an 8-bit and 16-bit game. It's an action sidescroller platformer that anyone, but especially retro gamers, should love. The amount of polish on this game is amazing, from the visuals to the controls to the story to the astounding soundtrack. And most impressive of all, every single thing in the entire game was made from scratch by a single person over the course of 5 years. It's the only game I would honestly call completely perfect.

http://www.miraigamer.net/cavestory/downloads_1.php

Click here and download the first 2 links (or I suppose only the first one if you're fluent in Japanese). Patch it to English and enjoy! (Yes, it's virus-free.)

This was recorded by IroncladPhazon. Visit his channel because I guarantee if you like mine, you'll like his.

http://www.youtube.com/ironcladphazon

Now about my video.

I made this in a different program, called Advanced Mario Sequencer. Major differences from Mario Paint Composer include:

+ Scrolling playback, more like Mario Paint (the original one)
+ better file management system (actual documents, no text files)
+ 6 instrument limit
+ larger note range
+ easier soundfont management
+ does not add notes when minimized
- no scrolling with arrow keys
- no easy way to string text files
- Some bugs (Though it's still in Beta, and I'm sure it'll be fixed)

Click here to read more and find a download link:

http://mariopaintcomposer.proboards.com/index.cgi?board=ams

Well since I've spent so long talking about everything BUT the composing I'll keep this short. Basically, I was aiming for epic with low-tempo and original soundfont. I'll let my video do the most of the talking.

Thanks for watching AND DOWNLOADING CAVE STORY!
